chunks.title: Conquest of Bashan and Land Distribution
chunks.reason: Narrative account of the battle with Og and the allocation of territory to Reuben, Gad, and Manasseh.

chunks.title: Command to the Transjordan Tribes
chunks.reason: Moses instructs the tribes on their duty to cross the Jordan while their families remain behind.

chunks.title: Encouragement to Joshua
chunks.reason: Moses speaks directly to Joshua about God's power and the upcoming conquest.

chunks.title: Moses' Plea and Final Commission
chunks.reason: Combines Moses' prayer to enter the land, God's response, and the final instruction to Joshua.
